---
title: "Fig 4o - brightfield neurite-xcorr (Arp3 KO genotype)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  genotype: "KO"
  pixel: 0.1081075
  freq: 0.8
  cell_range_start: 10
  cell_range_end: 18
  cell_prefix: "Cell"
---

<!--
================================================================================
  WRAPPER for Fig 4o, Arp3 KO genotype.
================================================================================
  Includes the canonical CCF template at:
      ../../templates/fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - genotype = "KO"        Metadata label (Arp3 KO)
    - pixel = 0.1081075      pixel-to-um calibration for this imaging session
    - freq = 0.8 Hz          imaging frame frequency
    - cell_range = 10..18    cell indices for the KO cohort (9 cells)
    - cell_prefix = "Cell"   KO used non-underscore folder names

  Original 2045-line monolithic wrapper refactored 2026-05-12: served
  as the canonical-template basis (chosen over WT because KO lacked the
  bioimagetools tutorial deadwood). 5 real per-genotype differences
  replaced with `params$...` references.

  Essentiality: Essential. Pairs with fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr_wt.Rmd.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr.Rmd"}
```
